subject: [PATCH v5 11/11] selftests/mm: add PMD swap entry tests

2026-07-22.patch_summary: This patch adds a set of tests to exercise the PMD swap entry paths in the Linux kernel. The tests cover various scenarios, including swapping out and in THPs (Transparent Huge Pages), fork and write operations, userfaultfd, munmap, mprotect, mremap, pagemap reading, mincore, MADV_FREE, MADV_WILLNEED, and swapoff. The tests are designed to verify the correctness of data and the behavior of PMD-mapped THPs in different configurations, including with and without zswap enabled. The patch also adds a new category 'pmd_swap' and a wrapper script 'ksft_pmd_swap.sh' to run the tests.
